name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp email marketing — campaigns, lists, audience, performance analytics
purpose: Email marketing integration — campaign visibility and audience management

campaigns.notes: Campaign list, status, and performance stats — read-only

lists.notes: Audience list data contains PII — read for marketing role, write (subscribe/unsubscribe) requires explicit approval

performance.notes: Open rates, click rates, unsubscribes, revenue — read-only analytics

auth.notes: API key format: <key>-<server> e.g. abc123-us6. Server prefix determines the data center endpoint

notes: STATUS: Planned — MCP server implementation TBD. Evaluate official Mailchimp MCP or build via http_api adapter
Mailchimp API v3 is the current stable API; v3 base URL is https://<server>.api.mailchimp.com/3.0
API keys do not expire — rotate on a quarterly schedule
Namespace prefix: all tools surfaced as mailchimp.<tool_name>
Audience list data contains PII (email addresses, names, activity) — ensure DPA coverage
Rate limits: 10 simultaneous connections per API key
